narrative.summary: Recently relocated to larger space, bright and airy, extensive low-intervention and natural wines by glass/bottle - modern classic

blocks.title: The Space
blocks.body: You're on Ossington, mid-strip between the vintage shops and late-night spots. Paris Paris just moved into a bigger space, and you feel it immediately—high ceilings, natural light flooding through tall windows, enough room between tables that you're not listening to your neighbor's date. The aesthetic skews modern and minimal, the kind of place that lets the wine bottles and actual humans provide the warmth.

blocks.title: The Food
blocks.body: The menu reads modern French-leaning with enough restraint to let ingredients speak. That octopus everyone mentions comes tender with char, plated like they actually care how it looks. The kitchen knows how to finish strong—the lava cake is the molten-centered kind that requires actual timing, not a freezer trick. Pair everything with their serious natural wine list, available by the glass or bottle, which means you can get weird without committing to 750ml of funk.

blocks.title: Go When
blocks.body: This is your date spot when you want something polished without the stuffiness, or when you're trying to impress someone who actually knows wine. Grab a seat at the bar if you're solo and want Camila or whoever's behind the stick to steer you toward something good.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "We had such a great experience! We ordered two cocktails, Baby No Peach and Berry Blossom, both made by Camila, and they were absolutely delicious. Perfectly balanced, fresh, and honestly some of the best cocktails we’ve had in a while. You can tell care and skill went into them.

We shared the octopus, which was cooked perfectly tender, flavorful, and beautifully presented. And the lava cake to finish? Unreal. Rich, warm, and the perfect sweet ending.

But what really made everything stand out was the service. Camila was attentive, friendly, and made us feel genuinely taken care of without ever being overbearing. She gave great recommendations and her energy really elevated the whole experience.

Amazing drinks, incredible food, and top-tier service. Definitely coming back"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Such a lovely spot — I’ve visited Paris Paris many times, and it continues to deliver consistently great food. The corn croquettes are excellent: crisp on the outside, soft and flavorful inside. The half chicken is also one of the best versions I’ve had — beautifully cooked, juicy, and full of flavor.

I do enjoy the salads here, but personally I would love to see a version with raw tuna or tuna tataki. That style would bring an even smoother texture and elevate the dish further. Overall, the food is thoughtful, well executed, and very satisfying.

If you appreciate well-made, delicious food in a relaxed setting, this place is absolutely worth a visit."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "My boyfriend and I had an incredible time at Paris Paris celebrating a late Valentine’s Day dinner. The staff were all very friendly, attentive, and knowledgeable. Jay went above and beyond to make sure we had a great time. All of his food and drink recommendations were amazing. We highly recommend this restaurant and will definitely be back!"
